mapper.update: UPDATE ACCOUNTS a SET a.INITIAL_BALANCE = NVL(( SELECT NVL(ab.AVAILABLE_CASH, 0) + NVL(ab.LOCKED_CASH, 0) FROM ACCOUNT_BALANCE ab WHERE ab.ACCOUNT_NO = a.ACCOUNT_NO ), 0) + NVL(( SELECT SUM( NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(src.CURRENT_PRICE, sh.AVG_PRICE) ) FROM STOCKS_HELD sh LEFT JOIN STOCK_REALTIME_CURRENT src ON sh.STOCK_CODE = src.STOCK_CODE WHERE sh.ACCOUNT_NO = a.ACCOUNT_NO ), 0) WHERE a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACCOUNTS ( ACCOUNT_NO, USER_NO, INITIAL_BALANCE, CREATED_AT, STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_ACCOUNTS.NEXTVAL, #{_parameter}, 10000000, SYSDATE, 'ACTIVE' )
INSERT INTO ACCOUNT_BALANCE ( ACCOUNT_NO, AVAILABLE_CASH, LOCKED_CASH ) SELECT a.ACCOUNT_NO, a.INITIAL_BALANCE, 0 FROM ACCOUNTS a WHERE a.USER_NO = #{_parameter} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.update: UPDATE ACCOUNTS SET STATUS = 'DELETED' WHERE USER_NO = #{_parameter} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(ab.AVAILABLE_CASH, 0) + NVL(ab.LOCKED_CASH, 0) + NVL(stock_summary.STOCK_VALUE, 0) AS currentTotalAsset,
NVL(ab.AVAILABLE_CASH, 0) AS availableCash,
NVL(stock_summary.STOCK_VALUE, 0) AS stockValue,
NVL(a.INITIAL_BALANCE, 0) AS previousTotalAsset,
CASE WHEN a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' THEN '정상' WHEN a.STATUS = 'BANKRUPT' THEN '파산' WHEN a.STATUS = 'SUSPENDED' THEN '정지' WHEN a.STATUS = 'STOP' THEN '정지' ELSE a.STATUS END AS accountStatus,
a.CREATED_AT AS createdAt
FROM ACCOUNTS a
LEFT JOIN ACCOUNT_BALANCE ab ON a.ACCOUNT_NO = ab.ACCOUNT_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sh.ACCOUNT_NO, SUM( NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(src.CURRENT_PRICE, sh.AVG_PRICE) ) AS STOCK_VALUE FROM STOCKS_HELD sh LEFT JOIN STOCK_REALTIME_CURRENT src ON sh.STOCK_CODE = src.STOCK_CODE GROUP BY sh.ACCOUNT_NO ) stock_summary ON a.ACCOUNT_NO = stock_summary.ACCOUNT_NO
WHERE a.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT NVL(ab.AVAILABLE_CASH, 0) + NVL(ab.LOCKED_CASH, 0) + NVL(stock_summary.TOTAL_STOCK_VALUE, 0) AS totalAsset,
NVL(ab.AVAILABLE_CASH, 0) AS availableCash,
NVL(ab.LOCKED_CASH, 0) AS lockedCash,
NVL(stock_summary.TOTAL_STOCK_VALUE, 0) AS totalStockValue
FROM ACCOUNTS a
LEFT JOIN ACCOUNT_BALANCE ab ON a.ACCOUNT_NO = ab.ACCOUNT_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sh.ACCOUNT_NO, SUM( NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(src.CURRENT_PRICE, sh.AVG_PRICE) ) AS TOTAL_STOCK_VALUE FROM STOCKS_HELD sh LEFT JOIN STOCK_REALTIME_CURRENT src ON sh.STOCK_CODE = src.STOCK_CODE GROUP BY sh.ACCOUNT_NO ) stock_summary ON a.ACCOUNT_NO = stock_summary.ACCOUNT_NO
WHERE a.USER_NO = #{_parameter} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT sh.STOCK_CODE AS stockCode,
NVL(s.STOCK_NAME, sh.STOCK_CODE) AS stockName,
NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) AS quantity,
NVL(sh.AVG_PRICE, 0) AS avgPrice,
src.CURRENT_PRICE AS currentPrice,
NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(src.CURRENT_PRICE, sh.AVG_PRICE) AS stockValue,
src.CHANGE_RATE AS dailyChangeRate
FROM ACCOUNTS a
JOIN STOCKS_HELD sh ON a.ACCOUNT_NO = sh.ACCOUNT_NO
LEFT JOIN STOCKS s ON sh.STOCK_CODE = s.STOCK_CODE
LEFT JOIN STOCK_REALTIME_CURRENT src ON sh.STOCK_CODE = src.STOCK_CODE
WHERE a.USER_NO = #{_parameter} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) > 0
ORDER BY sh.STOCK_CODE

SELECT NVL(ab.AVAILABLE_CASH, 0) AS availableCash,
NVL(stock_summary.INVESTED_AMOUNT, 0) AS investedAmount
FROM ACCOUNTS a
LEFT JOIN ACCOUNT_BALANCE ab ON a.ACCOUNT_NO = ab.ACCOUNT_NO
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sh.ACCOUNT_NO, SUM( NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(sh.AVG_PRICE, 0) ) AS INVESTED_AMOUNT FROM STOCKS_HELD sh GROUP BY sh.ACCOUNT_NO ) stock_summary ON a.ACCOUNT_NO = stock_summary.ACCOUNT_NO
WHERE a.USER_NO = #{_parameter} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT sh.STOCK_CODE AS stockCode,
NVL(s.STOCK_NAME, sh.STOCK_CODE) AS stockName,
NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) AS quantity,
NVL(sh.AVG_PRICE, 0) AS avgPrice,
NVL(src.CURRENT_PRICE, sh.AVG_PRICE) AS currentPrice,
NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(src.CURRENT_PRICE, sh.AVG_PRICE) AS stockValue,
( NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(src.CURRENT_PRICE, sh.AVG_PRICE) ) - ( NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) * NVL(sh.AVG_PRICE, 0) ) AS profitAmount,
CASE WHEN NVL(sh.AVG_PRICE, 0) > 0 THEN ( ( NVL(src.CURRENT_PRICE, sh.AVG_PRICE) - NVL(sh.AVG_PRICE, 0) ) / NVL(sh.AVG_PRICE, 0) ) * 100 ELSE 0 END AS profitRate
FROM ACCOUNTS a
JOIN STOCKS_HELD sh ON a.ACCOUNT_NO = sh.ACCOUNT_NO
LEFT JOIN STOCKS s ON sh.STOCK_CODE = s.STOCK_CODE
LEFT JOIN STOCK_REALTIME_CURRENT src ON sh.STOCK_CODE = src.STOCK_CODE
WHERE a.USER_NO = #{_parameter} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND NVL(sh.STOCK_RESERVES, 0) > 0
ORDER BY sh.STOCK_CODE
